Transcript: There will be an Ohio district eleven members meeting tomorrow January 14th at 2 p.m. it'll be at the KC Hall 9 5 6 0 Walker Road McGregor. At the meeting the directors will recommend ratification of a proposed contract with Windsor raceway again tomorrow January 14 2 p.m. KC Hall 9 5 6 0 Walker Road McGregor a meeting to be held to consider ratification of a contract with Windsor Raceway. I'll see you there.
